name: Magus Pocus
short_description: Gather coins, discover objects in secret areas, defeat enemies, and survive deadly traps in this 2D platformer inspired by the 90s.
detailed_description:
Embark on the magical adventure of "Magus Pocus" and discover a realm full of challenges. Your fearless wizard, while collecting shining coins, not only accumulates points but also strengthens their life, becoming more resilient against emerging dangers.

Confront mystical enemies, avoid traps, and explore secret areas while seeking these precious coins. Each of them is a vital source, providing not only scores but also renewed vitality.

In "Magus Pocus," each coin is more than a treasure; it is the key to magical mastery and survival in this enchanted kingdom. Master the spells, accumulate coins, and become the ultimate wizard. Are you ready for the mystical journey?
